framework.name: OpenID Foundation Agent Identity Whitepaper
framework.description: Multi-author whitepaper from OpenID Foundation (April 2025+) that explicitly names recursive delegation, agent impersonation, consent fatigue, and multi-user shared agents as UNSOLVED problems. Notably architecture-forward with zero post-mortems or production failure citations.
framework.raw_quote: Recursive delegation creates risks. Agents spawning sub-agents or communicating tasks to other agents create complex authorization chains without clear scope attenuation mechanisms.
